title: Which companies have alien biologics?
summary: This interview segment discusses the potential involvement of Battelle Memorial Institute in studying UAP-related biological and material samples. The conversation covers the historical separation of public and classified UFO research, and references claims about advanced materials with molecular grid structures.

events.description: UFO-related classified work was placed under the Atomic Energy Commission

key_claims.claim: Battelle Memorial Institute likely studies actual UAP biologics and runs a biological materials lab out of Fort Detrick
Public UFO study was relegated to Project Blue Book while private classified work was managed by Battelle Memorial Institute
Robert Sarbacher told Whitley Strieber about materials at Battelle that had a designed molecular grid structure visible under electron microscopes, which made the thin material extremely strong
The molecular grid technology has likely been extrapolated into military technology
Sarbacher died before he was able to meet with Strieber
